answers.quantityPurchasedEvidence: PDF Qtd column 24,00; VL DB qty=24; Hybrid H extract qty=24; UI Last Purchase 24
answers.usableQuantityInterpretation: 24 bottles × 200 ml (20 cl/bottle — 0.20cl is supplier typo for 20cl)
answers.usableQuantityAlternateNote: SKU BBB-GINGER33ITA implies 33 cl/bottle → 7.92 L; secondary interpretation
answers.where48mlComesFrom: 24 invoice qty × 2 ml/bottle; 2 ml from detectVolume parsing 0.20cl as 0.20 centilitres (0.2 × 10)
answers.parserStageCreatingError: Stage 8 volume inference: detectVolume (ingredient-unit-inference.ts) + parsePurchaseStructureFromText bare_measure tier (stock-normalization.ts) → resolveInvoiceLinePurchaseFormat (invoice-purchase-format.ts)

rootCauseClassification.label: Conversion — decimal-leading CL token interpreted literally as 0.2 centilitres
rootCauseClassification.rationale: Stages 1–7 faithfully preserve PDF text and monetary fields. First computed wrong value is 2 ml at detectVolume (0.20 × 10). Source-document typo (0.20cl) is precondition A but not the first incorrect pipeline transformation.

notPrimary.A: Source PDF prints 0.20cl — upstream typo, faithfully copied; not pipeline invention
notPrimary.B: bare_measure tier correctly matches token; structure parse is faithful to wrong conversion
notPrimary.E: Pricing math is self-consistent given 48 ml usable

fixDesignDocumented.label: Partial — guard exists; no dedicated fix-design artifact

qtySemanticsSeparateTrack.label: Documented — 24 vs 2 case framing is orthogonal; €0 financial delta

verdictMeaning: Root-cause investigation closed. First incorrect stage, mechanism, and fix surface are proven with production replay. Safe to proceed to implementation design.
